data.title: Labcorp Q2 2025: Revenue $3.53B vs $3.22B in Q2 2024. EPS $2.84 vs $2.43. Adjusted EPS $4.35 vs $3.94. Raised full-year guidance.
data.description: The company has raised its full-year guidance after reporting financial results for the second quarter of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. Revenue increased to $3.53 billion from $3.22 billion, while diluted earnings per share rose to $2.84 from $2.43. Adjusted earnings per share also showed growth, reaching $4.35 compared to $3.94. In light of these positive results, the company has raised its enterprise revenue, adjusted earnings per share, and free cash flow guidance for the remainder of the year.

data.title: Sonic Automotive reports Q2 2025 earnings: $3.7B in total revenues (6% YoY), $602.2M in total gross profit (12% YoY).
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., Sonic Automotive, Inc., a major automotive retailer, announced its financial results for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The report highlighted a significant increase in total revenues, reaching $3.7 billion, marking a 6% growth compared to the previous year. Additionally, the total gross profit rose to $602.2 million, showing a 12% year-over-year increase. The positive financial results were driven by a non-cash pre-tax impact of $172.4 million.

data.title: Analyst says HODLing Bitcoin is crucial, but periodic selling reduces supply centralization. Whales divesting is positive.
data.description: In a recent statement, cryptocurrency analyst Willy Woo emphasized the significance of HODLing in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) investments. Despite this, Woo pointed out the potential benefits of occasionally selling to decrease supply centralization. Woo justified his recent decision to sell off all his Bitcoin holdings in a post on Tuesday, highlighting that while self-custody HODLing is crucial, there are exceptions. He noted that large holders, or "whales," pose a risk to the system due to their significant supply concentrations. Woo suggested that gradual divestment by whales, common during bull markets, can have positive effects. The analyst underlined the importance of self-custody HODLing in making Bitcoin "unruggable." For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TechnipFMC reports Q2 2025 results:- Revenue: $2.53B (13.5% increase qtr-over-qtr, 9.0% y-o-y)- Net income: $269.5M- Full financial details provided in schedules.
data.description: TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) released its second-quarter 2025 results, showing a revenue of $2.53 billion, a 13.5% increase from the previous quarter and a 9.0% rise from the same period last year. Net income for the quarter was $269.5 million, marking a significant growth compared to $142.0 million in the previous quarter. The company provided a detailed breakdown of financial results from continuing operations, including a reconciliation of U.S. GAAP to non-GAAP financial measures in the provided schedules.

data.title: Empire Petroleum extends rights offering, aiming to raise $5.0 million in gross proceeds.
data.description: Empire Petroleum Corporation (NYSE American: EP) has extended the expiration date of its subscription rights offering, aiming to raise up to $5 million in gross proceeds. The company, operating in New Mexico, North Dakota, Montana, Texas, and Louisiana, plans to secure $2.5 million from warrant exercising.

data.title: MarineMax Q3 in Fiscal 2025 sees revenue of $657.2M with 9% sales drop. Net loss at $52.1M, includes $69 non-cash charge.
data.description: In Oldsmar, Florida, MarineMax, Inc. (NYSE: HZO) reported its fiscal 2025 third-quarter results, ending on June 30, 2025. The company, known as the largest retailer of recreational boats and yachts worldwide, as well as a marina operator and superyacht services provider, disclosed revenue of $657.2 million for the quarter. Same-store sales experienced a 9% decrease during this period. The gross profit margin was reported at 30.4%. There was a net loss of $52.1 million, translating to $2.42 per share. It is important to note that this figure includes a non-cash goodwill impairment charge of $69.
Avery Dennison announces dividend payout in the latest financial report. #dividend #AveryDennison

data.title: CLOU releases white paper on active ventilation system following 59-hour fire test. Tier 1 energy storage provider in China.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, CLOU, known for being a Tier 1 energy storage system provider by BNEF, has introduced its White Paper regarding the Active Ventilation & Explosion-Proof System. This paper delves into the details of the company's advanced fire safety structure for energy solutions.

data.title: Trump's trade deal may boost Japanese car sales in U.S. with 15% tariffs on Japanese cars vs 25% on those made in Canada and Mexico.
data.description: U.S. automakers have expressed frustration over President Trump's decision to impose a 15% tariff on cars imported from Japan. This move impacts companies manufacturing cars in Canada and Mexico, as they will now face a higher tariff of 25%. The decision has sparked discontent within the industry as the disparity in tariffs puts certain automakers at a disadvantage and could potentially disrupt the balance of trade between the countries involved.

data.title: XRP price dips 19%, seen as 'healthy correction' by analysts amid overheated market conditions, potential for rebound.
data.description: Today, the price of XRP has decreased as a result of overheated conditions in the market. However, analysts predict that this decline is a typical market pullback that might lead to a more significant recovery in the short term. This market correction presents an opportunity for potential investors as XRP currently sits at a lower price point, making it potentially more attractive for those looking to buy.

data.title: Brunswick Corp. released Q2 2025 earnings; a conference call held on July 24. Earnings report available online.
data.description: Brunswick Corporation released its second-quarter financial results on July 24, 2025. The company will hold a conference call hosted by its CEO, CFO, and senior VP of finance at 10 a.m. CT/11 a.m. ET. Security analysts and investors can participate via telephone by calling 877-900-9524, with the webcast accessible at https://event.choruscall.com/mediaframe/webcast.html?webcastid=5aY81Md1. A replay of the call will be available until July 31, 2025, by calling 877-660-6853 or 201-612-7415. Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC) is a global leader in marine recreation, known for delivering innovative experiences on the water.

data.title: Marine Products Corp. (NYSE: MPX) shares Q2 2025 results, including EBITDA and free cash flow numbers. Declares regular dividend.
data.description: Atlanta, 24th July 2025 - A prominent fiberglass boat manufacturer, Marine Products Corporation (NYSE: MPX), shared its unaudited second-quarter financial results for the period ending on June 30, 2025. Non-GAAP metrics such as EBITDA, EBITDA margin, and free cash flow were included in the announcement.

data.title: CNX reports Q2 results; financial and operational details released on website.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, CNX Resources Corporation (NYSE: CNX) announced its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2025 through a release on its website. The company's second-quarter prepared remarks include key details about the performance.

data.title: RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) declared Q2 2025 financial results; diversified oilfield services company.
data.description: Atlanta-based RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES), a top oilfield services company, released its unaudited Q2 results as of June 30, 2025. The report includes non-GAAP figures and adjusted metrics such as revenues.

data.title: Darling Ingredients Inc. Q2 2025: Net income $12.7M (down from $78.9M in Q2 2024), total net sales $1.5B.
data.description: Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) announced today a second quarter 2025 net income of $12.7 million, equivalent to $0.08 per diluted share. This marks a decline from the second quarter of 2024, where net income was $78.9 million, or $0.49 per diluted share. The decrease was attributed to reduced earnings at Diamond Green Diesel (DGD). The company's total net sales for the second quarter of 2025 were reported at $1.5 billion, consistent with the figures from the same period in the previous year.

data.title: AS Tallink Grupp presented Q2 2025 results during webinar, with Paavo Nõgene and colleagues sharing insights.
data.description: AS Tallink Grupp convened an investor webinar on July 24, 2025, featuring Chairman of the Management Board Paavo Nõgene, as well as Management Board members Harri Hanschmidt and Margus Schults. This event focused on highlighting the company's second-quarter results for 2025. The company expressed gratitude towards all attendees for their participation in the webinar.

data.title: Bread Financial offers to buy up to $150.0 million worth of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2029 and/or 8.375% Fixed-Rate Subordinated Notes due 2035 through cash tender offers.
data.description: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. has announced cash tender offers to buy up to $150.0 million of its Senior Notes maturing in 2029 and Subordinated Notes maturing in 2035. The offer includes buying up to $100.0 million of the 2029 Notes and $50.0 million of the 2035 Notes. The Tender Offers are subject to terms outlined in the Offer to Purchase dated July 24, 2025.

data.title: Options trading now available on 5 new Tradr ETFs: CWVX, SMU, ASTX, GEVX, CEGX, catering to rising demand. NYC, July 24, 2025.
data.description: In New York on July 24, 2025, Tradr ETFs disclosed a surge in interest for 2x Leveraged Daily ETFs linked to AI infrastructure companies like CoreWeave and NuScale Power. These ETFs cater to advanced investors and traders. The provider stated that options trading for these ETFs is now available due to growing demand.

data.title: Finloop launches Web5 strategy with global Leading RWA platform "FRP" as Hong Kong embraces digital assets.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Hong Kong, the digital asset economy is gaining momentum as Finloop Finance Technology Holding Limited ("Finloop"), a worldwide comprehensive Web5 wealth technology platform launched by Fosun Wealth Holdings under Fosun, organized the "Finloop • Chain" event. This event marks a significant step in Hong Kong's shift towards embracing digital assets. Finloop aims to redefine traditional financial technology by offering a wide range of services.
